name: sanka-plugin
description: Sanka CRM plugin with MCP-powered contact and company discovery skill using native OAuth sign-in.

interface.shortDescription: Search Sanka contacts and companies with native OAuth
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's hosted MCP endpoint and a read-only CRM skill to find contacts and companies from Codex through the native browser-based OAuth flow. In Codex, start from the installed Sanka Plugin chip so the MCP server is attached to the thread. These queries must come from the hosted MCP tools, not from any local Sanka repo, Django shell, or Postgres fallback.
defaultPrompt: Find a company in Sanka by name
List recent contacts that match a search term
Search Sanka CRM for contacts and companies
